activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You should call the repair service”.
activities.prompt: A: The washing machine is making a strange noise. B: ___

evaluator.answer: You should call the repair service

activities.explanation: «Should call» ofrece una recomendación adecuada.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You shouldn't use it”.
activities.prompt: A: This plug is cracked. Can I still connect it? B: No, ___.

evaluator.answer: you shouldn't use it

activities.explanation: «Shouldn't use» expresa un consejo negativo por seguridad.

activities.instructions: Complete the question with “Should I book now”.
activities.prompt: A: The rooms are selling quickly. B: ___?

evaluator.answer: Should I book now

activities.explanation: «Should I ...?» pide consejo.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “It may rain later”.
activities.prompt: A: Why are you taking a waterproof jacket? B: ___

evaluator.answer: It may rain later

activities.explanation: «May rain» expresa una posibilidad futura.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “She might be at lunch”.
activities.prompt: A: Why isn't Dana answering her office phone? B: ___

evaluator.answer: She might be at lunch

activities.explanation: «Might be» ofrece una explicación posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You ought to report it”.
activities.prompt: A: The streetlight outside the school is broken. B: ___ to the council.

evaluator.answer: You ought to report it

activities.explanation: «Ought to report» formula una recomendación.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “We could ask for a later appointment”.
activities.prompt: A: None of us can arrive by three. B: ___

evaluator.answer: We could ask for a later appointment

activities.explanation: «Could ask» presenta una solución posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “It might not arrive today”.
activities.prompt: A: The tracking page still says “at the depot”. B: Then ___.

evaluator.answer: it might not arrive today

activities.explanation: «Might not arrive» expresa una posibilidad negativa.

activities.instructions: Complete the question with “What should we bring”.
activities.prompt: A: The campsite has cooking equipment but no bedding. B: ___?

evaluator.answer: What should we bring

activities.explanation: La pregunta solicita consejo sobre lo necesario para el viaje.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The keys may be in the side pocket”.
activities.prompt: A: I can't find the storage-room keys. B: ___

evaluator.answer: The keys may be in the side pocket

activities.explanation: «May be» presenta una localización posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You should compare the cancellation terms first”.
activities.prompt: A: This cheaper hotel is non-refundable. Shall I choose it? B: ___

evaluator.answer: You should compare the cancellation terms first

activities.explanation: La respuesta ofrece un paso prudente antes de decidir.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You shouldn't share the code with anyone”.
activities.prompt: A: A caller is asking for my verification code. B: ___

evaluator.answer: You shouldn't share the code with anyone

activities.explanation: «Shouldn't share» da un consejo de seguridad claro.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The road could be closed after the bridge”.
activities.prompt: A: Why is the navigation app sending us through the village? B: ___

evaluator.answer: The road could be closed after the bridge

activities.explanation: «Could be closed» propone una explicación posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The results should be ready by noon”.
activities.prompt: A: When do you expect the laboratory results? B: ___

evaluator.answer: The results should be ready by noon

activities.explanation: Aquí «should» expresa una expectativa razonable.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The shop may not accept cash”.
activities.prompt: A: Do I need to take my bank card? B: Yes, ___.

evaluator.answer: the shop may not accept cash

activities.explanation: «May not accept» expresa que el pago en efectivo quizá no sea posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You ought to ask for a written estimate”.
activities.prompt: A: The builder gave me a price over the phone. B: Before agreeing, ___.

evaluator.answer: you ought to ask for a written estimate

activities.explanation: «Ought to ask» recomienda obtener información verificable.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “We could divide the presentation into three parts”.
activities.prompt: A: How can all three of us speak during the presentation? B: ___

evaluator.answer: We could divide the presentation into three parts

activities.explanation: «Could divide» presenta una solución posible.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The entrance might be on the other side”.
activities.prompt: A: This gate is locked, but the building is open. B: ___

evaluator.answer: The entrance might be on the other side

activities.explanation: «Might be» ofrece una explicación posible sin presentarla como segura.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You should back up the folder, although the update may not affect it”.
activities.prompt: A: Could the system update delete my project folder? B: ___

evaluator.answer: You should back up the folder, although the update may not affect it

activities.explanation: La respuesta combina consejo preventivo y posibilidad negativa.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “It should take no more than twenty minutes”.
activities.prompt: A: How long do you expect the online application to take? B: ___

evaluator.answer: It should take no more than twenty minutes

activities.explanation: «Should take» comunica una duración esperada.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You should check the restrictions because the path might not be open”.
activities.prompt: A: Shall we plan a walk through the nature reserve tomorrow? B: ___

evaluator.answer: You should check the restrictions because the path might not be open

activities.explanation: La frase une un consejo con una posibilidad negativa que lo justifica.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The loose connection could be causing the interruptions”.
activities.prompt: A: The monitor works, but the image disappears every few minutes. B: ___

evaluator.answer: The loose connection could be causing the interruptions

activities.explanation: «Could be causing» plantea una causa posible de un problema actual.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “We ought not to publish the figures until we verify them”.
activities.prompt: A: These totals do not match the source spreadsheet. B: ___

evaluator.answer: We ought not to publish the figures until we verify them

activities.explanation: «Ought not to publish» da una recomendación negativa formal.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “The confirmation should arrive shortly, but it may go to your spam folder”.
activities.prompt: A: I registered ten minutes ago and have not received an email. B: ___

evaluator.answer: The confirmation should arrive shortly, but it may go to your spam folder

activities.explanation: «Should arrive» expresa expectativa y «may go» una posibilidad.

activities.instructions: Complete the reply with “You could request an extension, but you should explain the reason clearly”.
activities.prompt: A: I may not finish the report by Friday. What can I do? B: ___

evaluator.answer: You could request an extension, but you should explain the reason clearly

activities.explanation: «Could request» propone una opción y «should explain» aconseja cómo ejecutarla.
